name: Air Methods
description: Air Methods is a leading air ambulance provider, conducting over 100,000 lifesaving transports annually. Founded in 1980, the company emphasizes safety and outstanding patient care, ensuring they are always ready to respond when it matters most.

name: Angel MedFlight Worldwide Air Ambulance Services
description: Angel MedFlight specializes in medical air ambulance transportation, prioritizing patient care and safety throughout the entire process. With a commitment to excellence and a team of certified medical professionals, they ensure high-quality, responsive air medical services for every patient.

name: Capital Air Ambulance
description: Capital Air Ambulance specializes in providing expert care and rapid medical repatriation services for patients of all ages, including critical care transfers. Their capabilities include international transfers between intensive care units and tailored packages for both emergency and planned transport, ensuring a smooth bed-to-bed experience.

name: Air Evac Lifeteam
description: Air Evac Lifeteam is a leading provider of air ambulance services in the United States, operating over 150 bases across 18 states to ensure rapid access to emergency trauma care, particularly for rural communities.

name: EMSOS Medical
description: Air Ambulance Worldwide, Inc. specializes in air ambulance transportation services, providing efficient and timely medical transport for various clients, including private individuals and healthcare providers.

name: Superior Air-Ground Ambulance Service
description: Superior Ambulance, a leader in emergency medical services, offers comprehensive air ambulance services through its Superior Air Med division, which includes helicopter rescue and transport. With a dedicated flight team available 24/7 and a fleet of aeromedical helicopters, they ensure timely and effective air medical transportation.

name: Alpha Air Ambulance
description: Alpha Air Ambulance specializes in providing comprehensive medical assistance, including air ambulance services, tailored to meet the individual needs of patients. With a dedicated team of qualified medical professionals, they ensure prompt and effective support for medical transport and treatment.

name: Medway Air Ambulance
description: Medway Air Ambulance is a prominent provider of air medical transport services in North America, specializing in the critical care transport of patients, including neonatal and pediatric cases. With a commitment to safety and advanced medical technology, they offer 24/7 coordination of air and ground logistics, ensuring comprehensive bed-to-bed care for patients.

name: Acadian Air Med
description: Acadian Ambulance Service's Air Med Services is a national leader in air ambulance medical transports, having initiated operations in 1981 as the first aero-medical provider in the Gulf of Mexico. With a focus on patient care, Air Med Services conducts more first response missions than any other air medical program in the country.

name: Acute Air Ambulance
description: Acute Air Ambulance International specializes in Critical Care Air Ambulance services, offering a comprehensive bedside-to-bedside experience that includes medical evaluation, treatment, and ground transportation. Their highly trained medical team is equipped to handle various emergencies, ensuring patient comfort and safety during transport.
